titleInfo.title: The Glory of the Silk Road Art from Ancient China

mods.note: p. 127: Miniature stupa with images and engraved Buddhist text. Stone. H. 36 cm, D. 12.7 cm. Unearthed [this is an error. the stupa was recovered from Wangmugong in 1981] in 1981 in Sanweishan 三危山, near Dunhuang. Dunhuang City Museum. This is the Wang Zhaojian votive stupa (Abe 2002, 133, has a bad photograph.) For more details see Abe 202, 132.
